# 计算下列多重积分： (续1)

I _ {n} = a ^ {n} \int_ {0} ^ {1} d \xi_ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {\frac {1}{\xi_ {1}}} d \xi_ {2} \int_ {0} ^ {1 - \xi_ {1} - \dots - \xi_ {n - 1}} d \xi_ {n} = a ^ {n} \iint_ {\substack {\xi_ {1} \geqslant 0, \xi_ {2} \geqslant 0, \dots , \xi_ {n} \geqslant 0 \\ \xi_ {1} + \xi_ {2} + \dots + \xi_ {n} \leqslant 1}} d \xi_ {1} d \xi_ {2} \dots d \xi_ {n} = a ^ {n} I _ {n} (1),
$$

其中 $I_{n}(1)$ 表示当 $a = 1$ 时积分 $I_{n}$ 的值

另一方面，我们有

$$
I _ {n} (1) = \int_ {0} ^ {1} d \xi_ {n} \iint_ {\substack {\xi_ {1} \geqslant 0, \xi_ {2} \geqslant 0, \dots , \xi_ {n} \geqslant 0 \\ \xi_ {1} + \xi_ {2} + \dots + \xi_ {n - 1} \leqslant 1 - \xi_ {n}}} d \xi_ {1} d \xi_ {2} \dots d \xi_ {n - 1} = I _ {n - 1} (1) \int_ {0} ^ {1} (1 - \xi_ {n}) ^ {n - 1} d \xi_ {n} = \frac {I _ {n - 1} (1)}{n}.
$$

反复运用上述循环公式，可得 $I_{n}(1) = \frac{1}{n!}$

于是，最后得 $I_{n} = \frac{a^{n}}{n!}$

【4206】 $\int_0^1\mathrm{d}x_1\int_0^{x_1}\mathrm{d}x_2\dots \int_0^{x_{n - 1}}x_1x_2\dots x_n\mathrm{d}x_n.$

提示 化成累次积分或利用4203题的结果，均可获解。

解 $\int_{0}^{1}\mathrm{d}x_{1}\int_{0}^{x_{1}}\mathrm{d}x_{2}\dots \int_{0}^{x_{n - 1}}x_{1}x_{2}\dots x_{n}\mathrm{d}x_{n} = \int_{0}^{1}\mathrm{d}x_{1}\int_{0}^{x_{1}}\mathrm{d}x_{2}\dots \int_{0}^{x_{n - 2}}\frac{1}{2} x_{1}x_{2}\dots x_{n - 1}^{3}\mathrm{d}x_{n - 1}$

$$
\begin{array}{l} = \int_ {0} ^ {1} d x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} d x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {r _ {n - 3}} \frac {1}{2} \cdot \frac {1}{4} x _ {1} x _ {2} \dots x _ {n - 2} ^ {5} d x _ {n - 2} \\ = \dots = \frac {1}{2} \cdot \frac {1}{4} \dots \frac {1}{2 (n - 1)} \int_ {0} ^ {1} x _ {1} ^ {2 n - 1} d x _ {1} = \frac {1}{2 \cdot 4 \cdots 2 n} = \frac {1}{2 ^ {n} n !}. \\ \end{array}
$$

\*）也可利用4203题的结果直接得

$$
\int_ {0} ^ {1} \mathrm {d} x _ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {1}} \mathrm {d} x _ {2} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {x _ {n - 1}} x _ {1} x _ {2} \dots x _ {n} \mathrm {d} x _ {n} = \frac {1}{n !} \left(\int_ {0} ^ {1} \tau \mathrm {d} \tau\right) ^ {n} = \frac {1}{2 ^ {n} n !}.
$$

【4207】 $\iint_{\substack{x_1\geqslant 0, x_2\geqslant 0, \dots, x_n\geqslant 0 \\ x_1 + x_2 + \dots + x_n\leqslant 1}} \sqrt{x_1 + x_2 + \cdots + x_n} \mathrm{d}x_1 \mathrm{d}x_2 \dots \mathrm{d}x_n.$

解 作代换 $x_{1} = u_{1}(1 - u_{2})$

![](images/0bcad79c6faa7c27ea8a5039220f44306abb637185508871448dd3d39a0960b1.jpg)

$$
\begin{array}{l} x _ {2} = u _ {1} u _ {2} (1 - u _ {3}) \\ x _ {n - 1} = u _ {1} u _ {2} \dots u _ {n - 1} (1 - u _ {n}), \\ x _ {n} = u _ {1} u _ {2} \dots u _ {n}, \\ \end{array}
$$

则由 $x_{1} \geqslant 0, x_{2} \geqslant 0, \cdots, x_{n} \geqslant 0, x_{1} + x_{2} + \cdots + x_{n} \leqslant 1$ 知 $0 \leqslant u_{i} \leqslant 1 (i = 1, 2, \cdots, n)$ ，且有

$$
I = \left| \begin{array}{c c c c} 1 - u _ {2} & u _ {2} (1 - u _ {3}) & \dots u _ {2} u _ {3} \dots u _ {n - 1} (1 - u _ {n}) & u _ {2} u _ {3} \dots u _ {n} \\ - u _ {1} & u _ {1} (1 - u _ {3}) & \dots u _ {1} u _ {3} \dots u _ {n - 1} (1 - u _ {n}) & u _ {1} u _ {3} \dots u _ {n} \\ 0 & - u _ {1} u _ {2} & \dots & \dots \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ 0 & 0 & \dots u _ {1} u _ {2} \dots u _ {n - 2} (1 - u _ {n}) & u _ {1} \dots u _ {n - 2} u _ {n} \\ 0 & 0 & \dots - u _ {1} \dots u _ {n - 1} & u _ {1} \dots u _ {n - 1} \end{array} \right|
$$

如在每一列的元素上加上所有以后各列相应的元素，则在对角线下面的全部元素都等于零，而在对角线上的元素就等于 $1, u_{1}, u_{1}u_{2}, \dots, u_{1}\dots u_{n-1}$ 。因此，得

$$
I = u _ {1} ^ {n - 1} u _ {2} ^ {n - 2} \dots u _ {n - 1}.
$$

于是，最后得

$$
\begin{array}{l} \iint_ {x _ {1} \geqslant 0, x _ {2} \geqslant 0, \dots , x _ {n} \geqslant 0} \sqrt {x _ {1} + x _ {2} + \cdots + x _ {n}} d x _ {1} d x _ {2} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {0} ^ {1} \int_ {0} ^ {1} \dots \int_ {0} ^ {1} u _ {1} ^ {n - \frac {1}{2}} u _ {2} ^ {n - 2} \dots u _ {n - 1} d u _ {1} d u _ {2} \dots d u _ {n - 1} d u _ {n} \\ = \frac {2}{(n - 1) ! (2 n + 1)}. \\ \end{array}
$$

【4208】求以平面 $a_{i1}x_1 + a_{i2}x_2 + \dots +a_{in}x_n = \pm h_i$ （ $i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$

为界的 $n$ 维平行 $2n$ 面体的体积，这里设 $\Delta = |a_{ij}| \neq 0$ .

解令 $a_{i1}x_1 + a_{i2}x_2 + \dots +a_{in}x_n = \xi_i(i = 1,2,\dots ,n)$ ，即得 $2n$ 面体的体积

$$
V = \int_ {- h _ {1}} ^ {h _ {1}} \int_ {- h _ {2}} ^ {h _ {2}} \dots \int_ {- h _ {n}} ^ {h _ {n}} \frac {1}{| \Delta |} d \xi_ {1} d \xi_ {2} \dots d \xi_ {n} = \frac {2 ^ {n} h _ {1} \cdots h _ {n}}{| \Delta |}.
$$
